public/images/bathroom.webp.notes: Credible decorative bathroom, but it is a beige and timber showroom image reused across 13 routes. It does not show the specific storage, shower, towel or under-sink planning issues claimed by its guide alt text.
public/images/bathroom.webp.recommended_concept: A compact Australian bathroom with a vanity, shower storage and towel zone visible in one practical, lived-in scene.
public/images/bathroom.webp.important_objects: Vanity drawers, under-sink plumbing, towel hooks, shower caddy, realistic circulation space.
public/images/bathroom.webp.avoid: Luxury-spa styling, all-beige finishes, oversized room proportions, decorative objects that conceal storage.
public/images/bathroom.webp.suggested_alt_text: A compact bathroom showing vanity, shower and towel storage zones with clear floor space.

public/images/bedroom.webp.notes: A plausible but generic neutral bedroom reused across 12 routes. The dresser, wardrobe, under-bed storage and lighting details described by different guides are not all present.
public/images/bedroom.webp.recommended_concept: A modest Australian bedroom where the bed footprint, bedside zone, wardrobe access and one useful storage feature can be read clearly.
public/images/bedroom.webp.important_objects: Bed, bedside table and lamp, wardrobe doors, under-bed clearance, realistic walking path.
public/images/bedroom.webp.avoid: Hotel styling, beige-on-beige bedding, oversized room proportions, concealed storage details.
public/images/bedroom.webp.suggested_alt_text: A modest bedroom showing bedside storage, wardrobe access and clear walking space around the bed.

public/images/garage.webp.notes: Dark and restrained, but the wall storage, cabinets and clear floor zone make it useful across closely related garage-storage guides.

public/images/guides/bedroom-storage-bef.notes: Useful intentional before image. Loose items and blocked zones are legible without becoming an implausible mess.

public/images/guides/bedroom-storage-cle.phase_1_note: Retained on its original bedroom-storage guide and temporarily reused for the Mattress Sizes hero and featured card because it truthfully shows the bed footprint, wardrobe relationship and walking clearance.
public/images/guides/bedroom-storage-cle.notes: Useful intentional after image with the same viewpoint as its companion and a clear circulation improvement.

public/images/guides/coffee-machine-type.phase_1_note: The file remains in the repository for audit history but has no source or built public reference. The Coffee Machine Types article and featured card now use the existing text-only presentation.
public/images/guides/coffee-machine-type.notes: The image presents a fabricated retail-style lineup of recognisable machine types with invented controls in a forced cobalt and coral set. A commercial-intent guide should not imply that fictional products were assessed.
public/images/guides/coffee-machine-type.recommended_concept: One believable kitchen bench divided into three unbranded workflow zones: pod preparation, manual espresso preparation and automatic bean-to-cup preparation.
public/images/guides/coffee-machine-type.important_objects: Unbranded machines, cups, beans, portafilter, pod drawer, water access, bench depth and realistic working clearance.
public/images/guides/coffee-machine-type.avoid: Logos, fake labels, recognisable copies of branded machines, impossible controls, product-lineup advertising composition.
public/images/guides/coffee-machine-type.suggested_alt_text: Three unbranded coffee preparation setups showing pod, manual espresso and automatic workflows on a kitchen bench.

public/images/guides/cookware-materials-.notes: The material differences are easy to compare and no branding is visible. A modest colour and exposure edit would reduce the dominant timber surface and make the cookware the clearer focus.

public/images/guides/cordless-stick-vacu.phase_1_note: The file remains in the repository for replacement review but has no source or built public reference. The guide temporarily uses living-room-storage-everyday-zones.webp and its featured Guides card is text-only.
public/images/guides/cordless-stick-vacu.notes: The handling pose is broadly plausible, but the generic product resembles a branded design and the heavily themed cobalt, coral and yellow room repeats the recent generated-image look. It shows use, not storage or charging.
public/images/guides/cordless-stick-vacu.recommended_concept: A realistic Australian laundry or utility cupboard showing an unbranded cordless stick vacuum being returned to a wall-mounted charging position.
public/images/guides/cordless-stick-vacu.important_objects: Stable wall dock, visible but correctly routed charging lead to the dock, vacuum body and attachments, nearby power point, door clearance.
public/images/guides/cordless-stick-vacu.avoid: A lead attached to the handheld vacuum, floating dock, recognisable branded silhouette, malformed grip or floor head, theatrical colour blocking.
public/images/guides/cordless-stick-vacu.suggested_alt_text: An unbranded cordless stick vacuum beside a wall-mounted charging dock and organised attachments in a utility cupboard.

public/images/guides/dishwasher-sizes-au.phase_1_note: The article header now uses object-position center 62% so the open door, lower rack and adjacent cabinetry survive the wide crop.
public/images/guides/dishwasher-sizes-au.notes: A strong source image showing the open door, racks and adjacent cabinets. The 3:2 source is vertically cropped in the wide hero slot, which risks losing the foreground door-clearance information.

public/images/guides/dryer-types-austral.phase_1_note: Full-resolution review found no urgent brand, label, cable, installation or geometry defect. Keep temporarily while the more explanatory Phase 1 asset is produced.
public/images/guides/dryer-types-austral.notes: The open dryer door and laundry layout are useful, but the image does not explain the heat-pump, condenser and vented comparison or show a ventilation path.
public/images/guides/dryer-types-austral.recommended_concept: A credible laundry comparison scene showing three installation consequences rather than three branded machines: vent path, condensate drain or tank access, and door clearance.
public/images/guides/dryer-types-austral.important_objects: Exterior vent or duct route, condensate drain connection or removable tank access, nearby washer, door swing and walking clearance.
public/images/guides/dryer-types-austral.avoid: Unsafe flexible ducting, sealed vented dryer cupboard, impossible hoses, product logos, three identical fictional appliances.
public/images/guides/dryer-types-austral.suggested_alt_text: Laundry layouts showing dryer door clearance, a vent route and condensate drainage considerations.

public/images/guides/fridge-dimensions-a.phase_1_note: The article header now uses object-position 42% 28%; its Guides card uses 42% center. These positions retain the overhead cavity, open door and nearby island gap.
public/images/guides/fridge-dimensions-a.notes: The cavity, open door and nearby island make this one of the better restored-guide sources. A wide crop should retain the door edge, island gap and overhead clearance rather than centring only the appliance.

public/images/guides/garage-storage-doub.notes: A practical garage scene with vehicle access, storage and circulation visible together.

public/images/guides/garage-storage-work.notes: Clear instructional diagram. Embedded labels are essential information rather than decorative text.

public/images/guides/home-office-desktop.notes: A credible desk scene, but the cable-management subject is barely visible and the dark grey styling feels like a display office rather than practical editorial evidence.
public/images/guides/home-office-desktop.recommended_concept: A lived-in desk shown from a three-quarter side angle so the power board, cable tray and separation of data and power leads are visible.
public/images/guides/home-office-desktop.important_objects: Power board mounted off the floor, cable tray, monitor lead, laptop charger, accessible power point and leg clearance.
public/images/guides/home-office-desktop.avoid: Hidden cables, unsafe overloaded adaptors, loose leads across feet, sterile showroom styling, unreadable screen text.
public/images/guides/home-office-desktop.suggested_alt_text: A home-office desk showing a mounted power board, cable tray and clear leg space.

public/images/guides/home-office-storage.notes: A useful planning diagram with clear access and clearance information.

public/images/guides/living-room-storage.notes: Useful intentional before image. The scattered items show the problem without unsafe or implausible clutter.
Useful intentional after image with the same viewpoint and an obvious improvement in everyday zones.

public/images/guides/mattress-sizes-aust.phase_1_note: The file remains in the repository for audit history but has no source or built public reference. The guide temporarily uses bedroom-storage-clear-walkway.webp.
public/images/guides/mattress-sizes-aust.notes: A yellow measuring strip appears built into the mattress with an implausible black device at its end. The artificial product treatment and saturated themed room undermine a dimensional planning guide.
public/images/guides/mattress-sizes-aust.recommended_concept: A believable Australian bedroom viewed from the foot or doorway, showing a standard bed footprint and measurable walking clearances to a wardrobe and wall.
public/images/guides/mattress-sizes-aust.important_objects: Bed edges, bedside tables, hinged or sliding wardrobe, doorway, visible floor gaps and a normal tape measure placed on the floor.
public/images/guides/mattress-sizes-aust.avoid: Tape fused into the mattress, invented labels, floating furniture, luxury-suite proportions, saturated cobalt and terracotta styling.
public/images/guides/mattress-sizes-aust.suggested_alt_text: A bedroom showing the bed footprint and walking clearances to the wardrobe, wall and doorway.

public/images/guides/nursery-storage-com.notes: A compact, plausible nursery where cot, change area, storage and walking space are visible.

public/images/guides/outdoor-storage-bri.notes: A strong Australian-scale courtyard scene with weather exposure, access and storage placement easy to judge.

public/images/guides/pantry-cabinet-meas.notes: A clear measurement diagram that directly supports the guide.

public/images/guides/pantry-storage-navy.notes: Relevant and legible, but the dark grey and navy grading could be opened slightly so shelf depth and stored items read more clearly.

public/images/guides/pet-essentials-befo.notes: Useful intentional before image with pet supplies visibly interrupting circulation.

public/images/guides/pet-essentials-home.phase_1_note: Retained on its original guide and temporarily reused as the Pets category, card and guide fallback with one truthful general alt description.
public/images/guides/pet-essentials-home.notes: Useful intentional after image with a clear feeding and storage zone.

public/images/guides/queenslander-laundr.notes: A distinctive and practical Australian laundry showing top-loader lid clearance and a usable working path.

public/images/guides/robot-vacuum-buying.phase_1_note: The file remains in the repository for replacement review but has no source or built public reference. The guide and its featured Guides card temporarily use living-room-storage-before-cluttered-zones.webp.
public/images/guides/robot-vacuum-buying.notes: The current file has no cord attached to the robot. It does show a dock, chair legs and rug transition, but the almost empty, heavily themed cobalt and orange room omits the loose obstacles central to the guide and feels generated.
public/images/guides/robot-vacuum-buying.recommended_concept: A realistic living area showing an unbranded robot vacuum approaching a rug edge with a dock, chair legs, low furniture and a few plausible loose obstacles in view.
public/images/guides/robot-vacuum-buying.important_objects: Unplugged robot away from dock, dock connected correctly to wall power, rug transition, chair legs, low sofa clearance, one cable or pet toy placed as an obstacle.
public/images/guides/robot-vacuum-buying.avoid: Any lead attached to the robot, floating dock, impossible reflections, branded lidar design, empty showroom, forced cobalt and terracotta palette.
public/images/guides/robot-vacuum-buying.suggested_alt_text: An unbranded robot vacuum navigating a rug edge, furniture legs and loose obstacles near its charging dock.

public/images/guides/shallow-u-shaped-va.notes: A close, credible view of the drawer geometry and plumbing cut-out that directly explains the planning issue.

public/images/header-title.png.notes: The primary publication wordmark. Its embedded lettering and logo are intentional brand identity, not decorative article imagery.

public/images/header-title.webp.notes: Alternate-format publication wordmark. Perceptually identical to the PNG but retained because both formats are currently referenced.

public/images/home-lifestyle-hero.jpg.notes: A technically sound but generic beige, pale-timber and muted-green home scene. As the broad homepage image it sets the repetitive visual tone the revised standard is intended to correct.
public/images/home-lifestyle-hero.jpg.recommended_concept: A contemporary Australian home scene with practical zones, confident but natural colour and a recognisable indoor-outdoor connection.
public/images/home-lifestyle-hero.jpg.important_objects: Everyday furniture, useful storage, daylight, a glimpse of veranda or garden, varied materials beyond timber.
public/images/home-lifestyle-hero.jpg.avoid: Luxury display home, beige-on-beige palette, empty styling, American-scale proportions, decorative clutter.
public/images/home-lifestyle-hero.jpg.suggested_alt_text: A contemporary Australian living area with practical storage, natural light and an indoor-outdoor connection.

public/images/home-office.webp.notes: Generic timber desk styling reused across office guides with different planning claims. It does not show storage access, cable control, lighting or ergonomic clearances with enough specificity.
public/images/home-office.webp.recommended_concept: A compact working home office with desk depth, chair clearance, storage access, task light and cable route all visible.
public/images/home-office.webp.important_objects: Desk, adjustable chair, drawer or shelf access, power point and cable tray, task light, window glare control.
public/images/home-office.webp.avoid: Decorative laptop-only desk, all-timber palette, hidden cables, unreadable screen text, oversized executive office.
public/images/home-office.webp.suggested_alt_text: A compact home office showing chair clearance, accessible storage, task lighting and managed cables.

public/images/kitchen.webp.notes: The most heavily reused category fallback after the brand assets. It is a generic beige and timber display kitchen serving 14 routes whose specific appliance, pantry, storage and workflow details are not visible.
public/images/kitchen.webp.recommended_concept: A practical Australian kitchen where one clear work triangle, appliance landing area, pantry access and drawer zone can be read without luxury styling.
public/images/kitchen.webp.important_objects: Fridge cavity, sink, cooktop, appliance landing space, open drawer or pantry door, realistic aisle width.
public/images/kitchen.webp.avoid: Pale timber everywhere, oversized island, sterile styling, impossible appliance clearances, decorative props obscuring work surfaces.
public/images/kitchen.webp.suggested_alt_text: A practical kitchen showing appliance landing space, pantry access, drawers and a clear working aisle.

public/images/laundry.webp.notes: A polished grey and timber laundry reused across 14 routes. It cannot honestly support guide-specific alt text about top loaders, renters, narrow rooms, hampers, drying or linen storage.
public/images/laundry.webp.recommended_concept: A modest Australian laundry with a front loader, usable bench, hamper, drying option and circulation path visible.
public/images/laundry.webp.important_objects: Appliance cavity, nearby power and plumbing, door swing, hamper, drying rail or outdoor access, clear working space.
public/images/laundry.webp.avoid: Display-home scale, concealed services, unsafe stacked appliances, all-grey cabinetry, props hiding clearances.
public/images/laundry.webp.suggested_alt_text: A compact laundry showing appliance space, bench, hamper, drying area and clear working access.

public/images/living-room.webp.notes: A generic beige and timber living room reused across 12 routes. It does not explain TV placement, cable control, toy storage, traffic flow or small-room layout.
public/images/living-room.webp.recommended_concept: An ordinary Australian living room with a readable TV wall, seating path, closed and open storage, and one everyday activity zone.
public/images/living-room.webp.important_objects: Sofa, TV wall or media unit, cable route, storage, doorway path, rug edge and realistic viewing distance.
public/images/living-room.webp.avoid: Luxury showroom, beige-on-beige styling, fireplace as default focal point, impossible TV height, hidden circulation.
public/images/living-room.webp.suggested_alt_text: A living room showing TV placement, practical storage and a clear path around the seating area.

public/images/Media Room.webp.notes: Apparently unused. The dark stone and timber room feels niche and high-end rather than representative; replace only if the file is brought back into use.
public/images/Media Room.webp.recommended_concept: A modest media room showing viewing distance, screen height, speaker or soundbar placement and cable access.
public/images/Media Room.webp.important_objects: TV, seating, visible viewing path, power and cable route, controlled daylight.
public/images/Media Room.webp.avoid: Cinema mansion styling, stone feature walls as default, impossible screen height, hidden wiring access.
public/images/Media Room.webp.suggested_alt_text: A modest media room showing TV height, seating distance and accessible cable routes.

public/images/nursery-home-hero.png.notes: Apparently unused, but it is a credible nursery source with cot, change area and circulation visible. Preserve for possible deliberate reuse.

public/images/Nursery-kids.webp.notes: A wide beige and timber nursery used across 13 routes covering babies, older children, toy storage, shared rooms and furniture anchoring. It cannot explain all of those subjects.
public/images/Nursery-kids.webp.recommended_concept: A compact child or nursery room with safe furniture placement, reachable storage and a clear adult access path.
public/images/Nursery-kids.webp.important_objects: Age-appropriate bed or cot, anchored storage, toy zone, change or dressing zone, clear doorway and circulation.
public/images/Nursery-kids.webp.avoid: Unanchored tall furniture, unsafe cot objects, beige-only palette, impossible overhead perspective, luxury nursery styling.
public/images/Nursery-kids.webp.suggested_alt_text: A compact child’s room showing reachable storage, safe furniture placement and clear floor access.

public/images/outdoor-garden.webp.notes: A pleasant but heavily warm-graded courtyard reused across 13 routes. It does not show the sheds, balconies, hoses, tools, weather exposure or renter constraints described by different guides.
public/images/outdoor-garden.webp.recommended_concept: A small Australian courtyard or balcony with shade, weather exposure, outdoor storage and a clear access path visible.
public/images/outdoor-garden.webp.important_objects: Storage box or cabinet, hose or tools, door threshold, drainage, covered and exposed zones, compact seating.
public/images/outdoor-garden.webp.avoid: Resort garden, orange colour cast, dense styling that hides access, impossible weather protection, American yard scale.
public/images/outdoor-garden.webp.suggested_alt_text: A small outdoor area showing weather-exposed storage, drainage and clear access from the house.

public/images/pet.webp.phase_1_note: The file remains in the repository for audit history but has no source or built public reference. pet-essentials-home-zones.webp is the temporary safe fallback.
public/images/pet.webp.notes: This high-reach fallback combines cat furniture, an aquarium, a dog bed and product shelves in one artificial timber showroom. Several package labels are unreadable or invented, making the generated origin obvious across 14 routes.
public/images/pet.webp.recommended_concept: A contemporary, realistic Australian home pet-care zone with a clearly visible small companion bird in the central crop-safe area, practical closed storage and a clear household walking route.
public/images/pet.webp.important_objects: A companion bird on a safe perch or beside a coherent cage or stand, closed supply storage, grooming items or toys, protected bowls where included, easy-clean flooring and a clear walkway. A dog bed, lead or feeding station may appear only as a non-living cue to broader pet ownership.
public/images/pet.webp.avoid: Dog-only or cat-only framing, a cat tree, crowded live animals, bowls in a doorway or main walkway, fake packaging, readable branding, recognisable retail products, fake specialist equipment, all-timber showroom styling and malformed bird, cage or storage geometry.
public/images/pet.webp.suggested_alt_text: A practical pet-care zone with a companion bird, closed supply storage, grooming items and a clear household walkway.

public/images/pet2.webp.notes: Apparently unused. A credible dog-bed scene with no visible branding; retain as a possible source for a deliberately matched guide.

public/images/shane.webp.notes: A credible author portrait. The automated route scan found no current use, but it should be retained.

public/images/social/bathroom.jpg.notes: Correct 1200 by 630 social ratio, but the template embeds the logo and text beside the same generic beige bathroom used throughout the category.
public/images/social/bathroom.jpg.recommended_concept: A clean social crop based on the future bathroom planning image, with a safe focal zone that works without embedded headline text.
public/images/social/bathroom.jpg.important_objects: Vanity, shower storage and open circulation with the subject held inside the central crop-safe area.
public/images/social/bathroom.jpg.avoid: Embedded article title, logo lockup, pale low-contrast crop, decorative spa scene.
public/images/social/bathroom.jpg.suggested_alt_text: A compact bathroom showing practical vanity and shower storage.

public/images/social/bedroom.jpg.notes: Correct social ratio, but the templated logo and headline sit beside the same generic neutral bedroom used across the category.
public/images/social/bedroom.jpg.recommended_concept: A clean social crop of a practical bedroom-planning scene with the bed and access path inside the central safe area.
public/images/social/bedroom.jpg.important_objects: Bed edge, wardrobe access and clear walking space.
public/images/social/bedroom.jpg.avoid: Embedded text, logo lockup, hotel styling, beige-on-beige crop.
public/images/social/bedroom.jpg.suggested_alt_text: A bedroom showing clear access around the bed and wardrobe.

public/images/social/garage-storage.jpg.notes: Correct social ratio and relevant scene, but it retains the same text-heavy category template and dark generic crop.
public/images/social/garage-storage.jpg.recommended_concept: A clean social crop of a practical garage access scene, using the strongest dedicated garage source.
public/images/social/garage-storage.jpg.important_objects: Vehicle edge, wall storage and clear walking path inside the crop-safe area.
public/images/social/garage-storage.jpg.avoid: Embedded title, logo lockup, black crushed shadows, empty showroom.
public/images/social/garage-storage.jpg.suggested_alt_text: A garage showing wall storage and clear access beside a vehicle.

public/images/social/home-office.jpg.notes: Correct social ratio, but the embedded template text and generic timber desk repeat the weak category fallback.
public/images/social/home-office.jpg.recommended_concept: A clean social crop of a compact working desk with chair clearance and cable management visible.
public/images/social/home-office.jpg.important_objects: Desk, chair, storage and one visible managed cable route.
public/images/social/home-office.jpg.avoid: Embedded text, logo lockup, decorative laptop-only styling, all-timber crop.
public/images/social/home-office.jpg.suggested_alt_text: A compact home office with accessible storage and managed cables.

public/images/social/kitchen.jpg.notes: The most reused category social image. It is technically the right ratio but repeats the beige kitchen and relies on embedded branding and category text.
public/images/social/kitchen.jpg.recommended_concept: A clean social crop of a future kitchen workflow image with useful appliance and pantry details in the safe area.
public/images/social/kitchen.jpg.important_objects: Working aisle, pantry or drawer access and appliance landing zone.
public/images/social/kitchen.jpg.avoid: Embedded title, logo lockup, oversized island, pale timber throughout.
public/images/social/kitchen.jpg.suggested_alt_text: A practical kitchen showing pantry access and a clear working aisle.

public/images/social/laundry.jpg.notes: Correct social ratio, but the text-heavy template and generic grey laundry repeat across a large category.
public/images/social/laundry.jpg.recommended_concept: A clean social crop of a compact laundry with appliance, bench and drying access visible.
public/images/social/laundry.jpg.important_objects: Appliance door or lid, work surface and circulation.
public/images/social/laundry.jpg.avoid: Embedded title, logo lockup, all-grey cabinetry, display-home scale.
public/images/social/laundry.jpg.suggested_alt_text: A compact laundry showing appliance access and practical working space.

public/images/social/living-spaces.jpg.notes: Correct social ratio, but the embedded template and beige living-room crop add to the publication-wide repetition.
public/images/social/living-spaces.jpg.recommended_concept: A clean social crop of a living room where the TV wall, storage and seating path are legible.
public/images/social/living-spaces.jpg.important_objects: Sofa edge, media storage and open path.
public/images/social/living-spaces.jpg.avoid: Embedded title, logo lockup, luxury styling, fireplace as the only focal point.
public/images/social/living-spaces.jpg.suggested_alt_text: A living area showing practical media storage and a clear seating path.

public/images/social/nursery-kids.jpg.notes: Correct social ratio, but the embedded template repeats the same beige nursery crop used across unrelated age groups and topics.
public/images/social/nursery-kids.jpg.recommended_concept: A clean social crop of a safe compact child’s room with reachable storage and clear access.
public/images/social/nursery-kids.jpg.important_objects: Bed or cot edge, anchored storage and open floor path.
public/images/social/nursery-kids.jpg.avoid: Embedded title, logo lockup, unsafe cot objects, beige-only palette.
public/images/social/nursery-kids.jpg.suggested_alt_text: A compact child’s room with reachable storage and clear floor access.

public/images/social/outdoor-garden.jpg.notes: Correct social ratio, but the embedded template and warm-graded generic courtyard do not represent the varied outdoor guides.
public/images/social/outdoor-garden.jpg.recommended_concept: A clean social crop of an Australian courtyard showing storage and weather exposure.
public/images/social/outdoor-garden.jpg.important_objects: Door threshold, outdoor cabinet or box, exposed and sheltered zones.
public/images/social/outdoor-garden.jpg.avoid: Embedded title, logo lockup, orange colour cast, resort styling.
public/images/social/outdoor-garden.jpg.suggested_alt_text: A small courtyard showing outdoor storage and weather-exposed access.

public/images/social/pets.jpg.phase_1_note: No new AI image was generated during the repository repair. The Pets social image was produced as a deterministic 1200 by 630 derivative of an approved AI-generated source image supplied to the project. No stock or branded photography was introduced.
public/images/social/pets.jpg.notes: A safe temporary 1200 by 630 crop of the approved household dog zone. The permanent social treatment should be reviewed again after the final pet category asset is approved.
public/images/social/pets.jpg.recommended_concept: A clean social crop of the approved inclusive Australian pet-care concept, with a clearly visible companion bird, closed supply storage and safe household circulation.
public/images/social/pets.jpg.important_objects: A companion bird on a safe perch or beside a coherent cage or stand, closed supply storage, grooming items and a clear walkway, with optional non-living cues to broader pet ownership.
public/images/social/pets.jpg.avoid: Embedded title, logo lockup, fake packaging or branding, a cat tree, dog-only or cat-only framing, crowded live animals, malformed bird or cage geometry and bowls blocking circulation.
public/images/social/pets.jpg.suggested_alt_text: A practical pet-care zone with a companion bird, closed supply storage, grooming items and a clear household walkway.

public/images/social-sharing.png.notes: A deliberate publication-level fallback at the correct 1200 by 630 ratio. The wordmark is appropriate here because the asset’s purpose is brand sharing rather than article illustration.
